title: Epic Mickey Decors
description: Mod that adds blocks and items from the wii game Disney Epic Mickey.
body:
[Mod Requires Geckolib!](https://modrinth.com/mod/geckolib)

A Mod that adds blocks and items from the wii game Disney Epic Mickey!

More stuff will be added in the future.


Please note that some of the objects don't work, and are only for decoration purposes
